nodes.name: Daily 7am CT Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 7:00 AM. Set n8n instance timezone to America/Chicago.

nodes.name: Read Activity Log from GitHub
nodes.notes: Reads the daily activity log from GitHub. Uses GitHub PAT for auth.

nodes.name: Build Claude Request
nodes.notes: Constructs Claude API request body in JavaScript to avoid n8n expression parsing issues.

nodes.name: Claude API - Format Report
nodes.notes: Sends activity log to Claude API. x-api-key provided by HTTP Header Auth credential.

nodes.name: Parse Report
nodes.notes: Extracts subject line and formats body as HTML for email.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Archive activity log for ' + $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd'), content: Buffer.from($('Read Activity Log from GitHub').first().json.data || '# No activity').toString('base64') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Reset daily activity log — ' + $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd'), content: Buffer.from('# CPAverse Agent Daily Activity Log

| Timestamp | Client Name | Action Taken | Documents Processed | Flags | Status |
|-----------|------------|--------------|-------------------|-------|--------|
').toString('base64'), sha: $('Read Activity Log from GitHub').first().json.sha }) }}

nodes.name: Reset Daily Log
nodes.notes: Resets activity log to fresh table after archiving.
